slides.title: Most of your salt is *hiding in plain sight*.
slides.sub: It is not the shaker. It is packaged food, slowly nudging your blood pressure up over years.

slides.title: Salt hides in packages
slides.body: Most sodium comes from bread, deli meat and ready meals, *not the shaker*. You rarely taste it.

slides.title: The slow, silent creep
slides.body: High sodium is linked to *a gradual rise* in blood pressure. The climb is quiet for years.

slides.title: Potassium helps offset it
slides.body: Fruit and vegetables bring potassium, which *can help balance* sodium and ease the pressure.

slides.title: Small cuts add up
slides.body: Choose lower-sodium versions and cook more at home. Even modest cuts *may help* over time.

slides.title: Mind the hidden grams
slides.body: You do not need a bland plate. Just watch the packaged food where *the salt really lives*.

slides.title: Protect the years that *feel good*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores your food, sleep and movement and turns the habits that protect your healthspan into one daily number.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Most of the salt raising your blood pressure isn't from the shaker. It's hidden in packaged food. 🌿

Sodium creeps up quietly over years. Balance it with potassium-rich fruit and veg, and make small cuts that add up. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the food and habits that age you well into one daily score → link in bio.
